summary:
The model plaster primarily consists of calcium sulfate dihydrate due to its proper setting properties suitable for dental applications requiring precision. Amalgam, containing mercury among other metals, can cause patient discomfort from potential allergic reactions or abrasive effects upon first contact with oral tissues; thus, alternatives are preferred even though amalgam offers strong retention benefits.
```
